questions.template: Please introduce yourself and explain why you are interested in the {job_role} role.
Walk us through your background and what motivated you to apply for this {job_role} position.
Tell us about a project you are proud of that is relevant to {job_role}.
Describe a technical or professional achievement that demonstrates your fit for {job_role}.
Share a project where you had to learn something new quickly. What was your approach?
Describe a challenge you solved with a team. What was your role?
Tell us about a time you disagreed with a colleague. How did you handle it?
Give an example of how you gave or received constructive feedback on a project.
How do you handle deadlines and pressure when priorities change?
Tell us about a time you missed a deadline or made a mistake. What did you learn?
Describe a situation where you had to manage multiple tasks at once. How did you prioritize?
Tell us about a difficult problem you solved. What steps did you take?
Describe a situation where your first solution did not work. What did you do next?
How do you approach debugging or investigating an issue you have never seen before?
Which tools or technologies do you use most often for work related to {job_role}, and why?
Explain a technical concept you use regularly in simple terms, as if speaking to a non-expert.
What is the most complex feature or system you have built or contributed to?
How do you ensure quality in your work (tests, reviews, documentation, etc.)?
Describe how you stay up to date with best practices in your field.
Why do you want to join our company for this {job_role} opportunity?
Where do you see yourself professionally in the next two to three years?
What type of work environment helps you perform at your best?
Tell us about a time you had to explain a complex idea to someone without your background.
How do you communicate progress and blockers to a manager or client?
Have you ever mentored or helped a teammate? Describe that experience.
Tell us about a time you took initiative without being asked.
Describe a situation where you had to meet a demanding stakeholder or user expectation.
How would you handle conflicting requirements from two different stakeholders?
Tell us about a professional decision where ethics or integrity mattered.
What questions would you like to ask us about the team or the {job_role} role?
Is there anything else we should know about your candidacy for {job_role}?
